plugins.name: briefing-toolkit
plugins.description: Daily read-only morning brief over connected MCP tools (Slack/Asana/Notion; needs interactively-authenticated MCP connections).

plugins.name: domain-teams
plugins.description: Domain-expert team skills (planning/code/design/research/copywriting) with quality-gate checkpoints.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault workflows (notes/markdown/diagrams/canvas) + LLM wiki layer (defuddle needs CLI).

plugins.name: philosophers-toolkit
plugins.description: Philosophical thinking frameworks for problem clarification and deeper reasoning.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Developer-workflow skills — git memory, decision briefs, critique, recap, handoff, session distill.

plugins.name: investing-toolkit
plugins.description: Three-layer investing research toolkit — data, analysis, report skills.

plugins.name: copywriting-toolkit
plugins.description: Pipeline copywriting toolkit — 14 skills from intake to audit, grounded in PASONA/Cialdini/FTC.

plugins.name: gws-toolkit
plugins.description: Google Workspace toolkit on the official gws CLI (drive/docs/sheets/gmail; Claude Code CLI only).

plugins.name: translation-toolkit
plugins.description: High-quality EN/JA/ZH translation with a bundled glossary + 6-gate verification.

plugins.name: tsundoku
plugins.description: Turn owned-but-unread Kobo e-books into actionable skills (Claude Code CLI only).

plugins.name: four-dx-coach
plugins.description: Multi-scope coach for the 4 Disciplines of Execution — Socratic coach + single-artifact audit modes.

plugins.name: repo-wiki
plugins.description: LLM wiki for code repos — init from src + commits, grow from changes, query in natural language.

plugins.name: dbt-wiki
plugins.description: Local-only two-layer knowledge base for dbt projects — semantic Q&A over manifest + column lineage.

plugins.name: deconstruct-toolkit
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts (copy/docs/UI/arguments/orgs) into their blueprints, in EN/JA/ZH.

plugins.name: systems-thinking-toolkit
plugins.description: Systems-thinking toolkit (Sherwood 2002) — CLDs, archetypes, simulation, and more across 7 skills.

plugins.name: legal-toolkit
plugins.description: In-house legal toolkit for Taiwan SMEs — contract review, playbook negotiation, drafting, research.

plugins.name: collab-toolkit
plugins.description: Read-only office-collab toolkit for Asana/Slack/Notion via MCP (servers declared in .mcp.json).

plugins.name: loom-code
plugins.description: Canon-grounded coding-discipline workflow (TDD/brainstorm/SDD/review) for Claude Code + Codex.

plugins.name: salesforce-toolkit
plugins.description: Salesforce DX MCP wrapped as a plugin — read-only SOQL, macOS only (MCP declared in .mcp.json).

plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Key-free research skills driving the host agent's own LLM + web tools (ships using-research-toolkit, deep-deep-research, fact-check, cite-check, deep-read).

plugins.name: loom-spec
plugins.description: Key-free GENERATE-layer spec skills — expand a seed into a high-recall spec + critique omissions.

plugins.name: loom-product-principles
plugins.description: Key-free generator for a PRINCIPLES.md project constitution — north star + falsifiable Product Principles, plus optional Design/Engineering Principles.

plugins.name: loom-interface-design
plugins.description: Key-free cross-modal (GUI/TUI/CLI) UX design generator — emits portable DESIGN.md + ui-flows.md.

plugins.name: loom-pipeline
plugins.description: Deterministic workflow driver conducting the loom principles→design→spec→code pipeline across station plugins.

plugins.name: ascii-graph-toolkit
plugins.description: CJK-width-aware ASCII/Unicode diagram & table toolkit for channels that can't render Mermaid.

plugins.name: skill-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Self-contained toolkit to author Claude Agent Skills — create, score, refactor, tune, dogfood.
